name: oh-my-claudecode
description: Throughput & autonomy lane. Route here when the work is about SCALE or RUNNING ON ITS OWN rather than per-line correctness: many independent edits at once, workers coordinating on a shared task list, hands-off lifecycle from a short brief, looping until tests pass, read-only 'why did this happen' investigation (no fix), light scoping, or research/knowledge ops. It governs HOW you work — NOT a document/slide/image domain (those are installed skills), and NOT rigorous test-first/verify-before-done correctness work (that is superpowers).

skills.name: throughput-autonomy-lane
skills.description: Representative signals that route to oh-my-claudecode (the session then picks the exact OMC skill).
examples: rename X across 20 files / many independent edits at once
여러 파일 한꺼번에 싹 다 바꿔줘
workers coordinate on a shared task list (multi-role review)
from a 2-3 line idea, run the whole lifecycle hands-off
keep looping on its own until tests pass
explain WHY this happened — analysis only, not fixing (trace)
성능이 왜 느린지 분석만, 고치진 말고
clarify my requirements before building / scope this lightly
